# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the pre-created Service Principal (from Azure AD / Entra ID). Create the SP outside ARM using az ad sp create-for-rbac or Terraform."
      }
    },
    "resourceGroupName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The specific resource group where the CI/CD pipeline deploys resources."
      }
    },
    "roleAssignmentGuid": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[newGuid()]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Unique GUID for the role assignment to ensure idempotency."
      }
    },
    "customRoleName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "CICD-Pipeline-Deployer",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name for the custom role with scoped permissions."
      }
    },
    "customRoleGuid": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[newGuid()]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Unique GUID for the custom role definition."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "customRoleDefName": "[guid(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('customRoleName'))]",
    "scopedResourceGroup": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', parameters('resourceGroupName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('customRoleDefName')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleName": "[parameters('customRoleName')]",
        "description": "Custom role for CI/CD pipeline with least-privilege permissions scoped to a specific resource group. Only allows resource deployment actions needed by the pipeline.",
        "type": "customRole",
        "permissions": [
          {
            "actions": [
              "Microsoft.Resources/deployments/*",
              "Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups/read",
              "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/*",
              "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/*",
              "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/*",
              "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/*",
              "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/*",
              "Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/*",
              "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/*",
              "Microsoft.Web/sites/*",
              "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/*",
              "Microsoft.Sql/servers/*",
              "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/*",
              "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/read",
              "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets/read",
              "Microsoft.Insights/components/*",
              "Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings/*",
              "Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/*",
              "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/*",
              "Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/*",
              "Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters/*"
            ],
            "notActions": [
              "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write",
              "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete",
              "Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/write",
              "Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/delete",
              "Microsoft.Authorization/elevateAccess/Action",
              "Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/write",
              "Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/delete",
              "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/runCommand/action",
              "Microsoft.ClassicCompute/*",
              "Microsoft.ClassicNetwork/*",
              "Microsoft.ClassicStorage/*"
            ],
            "dataActions": [],
            "notDataActions": []
          }
        ],
        "assignableScopes": [
          "[variables('scopedResourceGroup')]"
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('roleAssignmentGuid')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('customRoleDefName'))]"
      ],
      "scope": "[concat('Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups/', parameters('resourceGroupName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('customRoleDefName'))]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal",
        "description": "CI/CD pipeline deployer role - scoped to specific resource group with least-privilege permissions. Do NOT escalate to subscription scope.",
        "condition": "[concat('((!(ActionMatches{''Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write''})) AND (!(ActionMatches{''Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete''})))')]",
        "conditionVersion": "2.0"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "roleAssignmentId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', parameters('roleAssignmentGuid'))]"
    },
    "customRoleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('customRoleDefName'))]"
    },
    "securityNotes": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "IMPORTANT: This role is scoped to a single resource group with explicit deny on role assignment manipulation. If your pipeline needs to deploy to additional resource groups, create separate scoped role assignments for each. NEVER grant Contributor at subscription level."
    }
  }
}
